◎简　　介  

　　This gripping and dramatic 3x60' series uncovers how the Nazis took control of Germany.How did 20th Century Europe’s most liberal democracy fall into the hands of fascists? From Hitler’s political scheming that turned Germany’s parliament into a House of Cards, his War on Truth leading to book burning, and his scapegoating of minorities, this series explores in extraordinary d...
